scripts.build: astro build && node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs && node scripts/verify-canonicals.mjs
scripts.deploy: npm run build && aws s3 sync dist/ s3://kamalakar-heart-centre-prod --delete --profile sid-personal && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id E3STOTV0PG9BZU --paths "/*" --profile sid-personal
